name: Postponement of Public Disclosure for Private Rulings

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers who have requested a written determination (like a Private Letter Ruling). Requires a written request establishing that the transaction is not yet complete or that good cause exists for delay.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers who receive private letter rulings can elect to delay the public inspection of their written determination until after a transaction is completed to protect proprietary deal structures.
